claim: The analyzer reads occurrence objects from wfr.detect_occurrences using attributes .workflow, .mode == 'top-level', .occurrence_id, .start_event, .end_event; any attribute-name or 'top-level' literal drift breaks root selection and lifecycle extraction.
verify_hint: Check Occurrence class (scripts/workflow_flight_recorder.py ~line 66) field names and the 'top-level' mode value used by _select_root_occurrence and _extract_from_lifecycle

claim: wfr.detect_occurrences resets occurrence_id per call, so the analyzer composes lifecycle_id as f'{sid}\x1f{occurrence_id}' to make a globally-unique join key.
verify_hint: Check workflow_flight_recorder.py ~line 346 occurrence_id assignment; counters reset each detect_occurrences call

claim: Eligibility discriminator keys on candidate.invocation_evidence tokens exact_user_command / command_markup / embedded_user_command_candidate mirroring capture_prompt_manifest's writes.
verify_hint: Check workflow_flight_recorder.py ~1175-1192 and ~1286 for those exact literals written to invocation_evidence

claim: Comment asserts the recorder hardcodes candidate.provisional=True for every start kind (rationale for keying eligibility on invocation_evidence).
verify_hint: Check workflow_flight_recorder.py ~line 1287 'provisional': True written unconditionally

claim: _host_profile_from_manifest reads provider/devflow_version/claude_code_version as {value,source} dicts with bare-string fallback; real manifest shapes must be confirmed.
verify_hint: Check capture_prompt_manifest ~1286-1300 plus _plugin_version and _provider_classification return shapes

claim: _classify_source_status accepts bundle metadata.json only when schema_version == 2; the recorder-written bundle metadata must carry schema_version 2.
verify_hint: Check workflow_flight_recorder.py ~line 1449 bundle metadata schema_version (should be 2)

claim: _stop_attempts_state/_import_failed assume stop-attempts.jsonl is success-only, keyed on result=='captured' with integer transcript_bytes>=0.
verify_hint: Check _append_bundle_attempt (~1479-1494): writes result:'captured' and transcript_bytes:len(raw); no failure entries

claim: Extraction reads Event objects via event.raw['message']['content'], event.timestamp_ms, event.role (fallback raw['type']), event.index, event.tool_uses items with .get('name'=='Bash')/'input'/'id'.
verify_hint: Check Event class (~line 55) and tool_uses construction (~219-227) carry name/input/id

claim: load_cloud_mappings expects registry cloud_mappings.schema_version==1 and agent_jobs list entries with string workflow_file+job plus consumer/routed_command/consumer_approximate; registry must provide this section/schema.
verify_hint: Check scripts/workflow-flight-recorder-registry.json cloud_mappings object

claim: The registry contains the local first-message forms '/devflow:review' and '/review' (run.sh pins the literal).
The registry contains a cloud_mappings section (run.sh pins its presence).
scripts/verification_baseline.py carries the MIT SPDX header.
scripts/export-workflow-lifecycle-census.py carries the MIT SPDX header.
The docs anchor '#verification-launch-baseline-wave-1' referenced from three docs resolves to the '## Verification-launch baseline (Wave 1)' heading in workflow-flight-recorder.md.

Redaction comments assert no raw secret and no unkeyed digest of secret material leaves _redact_secrets for EVERY recognized class (env quoted/escaped/concatenated, --flag incl. plural/space-padded, -u quoted, URL password with '/' and '@', bearer).
verify_hint: Adversarial inputs per class through _redact_secrets/_binding_identity: TOKEN="a b c", TOKEN=sec\ ret, --api-keys = hunter2, -u "user:pass", https://user:pa/ss@host; assert no secret substring in redacted string or digest input; secret_affected True each

claim: Secret regexes claimed linear-time (no backtracking pair); quote-dense or colon-less adversarial operands must not cause ReDoS.
verify_hint: Time _redact_secrets on ~40-quote colon-less -u operand and quote-dense env/URL values with a wall-clock bound

claim: SECRET_ENV_ASSIGNMENT suffix-anchoring rejects PATH=/PATTERN=/KEYWORDS= while matching real secret names incl. plurals (API_KEYS, GITHUB_TOKENS, SECRETS).
verify_hint: _redact_secrets on 'PATH=/usr/bin','PATTERN=x','KEYWORDS=a' (not redacted) vs 'GITHUB_TOKEN=x','API_KEYS=x','AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY=x' (redacted)

claim: _classify_taxonomy never counts an incidental test-tool mention in a read-only command's arguments as a launch: 'cat lib/test/run.sh && echo done' and 'grep -r pytest .' -> other_command; 'cd repo && pytest' -> verification.
verify_hint: Call _classify_taxonomy on the enumerated command strings plus 'git commit -m "refactor && pytest"'

claim: Docs enumerate candidate_transport_retry requires ALL of: same explicit lifecycle, consumer/checkpoint when available, safe binding identity, prior missing/cancelled response NOT on temporally-last member, explicitly bounded interval (>=2 members both endpoints), matching workspace_state coverage, no retrigger evidence; _classify_relationship enforces every one (fails closed).
verify_hint: Construct member groups each dropping exactly one requirement; only the all-satisfied case returns REL_CANDIDATE_TRANSPORT_RETRY

claim: export census assumes Actions runs endpoint returns {workflow_runs:[...]} with id/path/name/run_attempt/created_at/run_started_at/conclusion/status/html_url and jobs endpoint {jobs:[...],total_count} with name/started_at/completed_at/conclusion/status/html_url.
verify_hint: Verify against GitHub REST API docs shapes

claim: gh api --method GET ... --raw-field created=after..before correctly passes a single created range param (a separate created<= would be split by gh at '=').
verify_hint: Confirm gh api flag semantics and Actions created range syntax

claim: read_cloud_census recomputes snapshot hash as sha256(json.dumps(rows,sort_keys=True,separators=(',',':'))) and must byte-match build_snapshot's computation.
verify_hint: Compare export-workflow-lifecycle-census.py ~138-139 against verification_baseline.py ~2504

claim: run.sh pins the analyzer module contains NO subprocess call site of any spelling (offline/no-subprocess guarantee).

manual_review_sample size = min(50, max(20, ceil(0.1*remainder))) capped at len(remainder); high-cost = top duration decile with inclusive ties; seeded by SHA-256(snapshot_hash || group_id); never exceeds remainder population.
verify_hint: Populations of remainder sizes 5,250,600; confirm formula, inclusive-tie decile, sha256 sort key

claim: build_cloud_census assumes job status in {queued,in_progress,completed}, conclusion incl. skipped/cancelled/action_required/stale; skipped/never-started jobs (null started_at) must not be confirmed_eligible.
verify_hint: Confirm against Actions API docs; scheduled_started/started_evidenced logic

claim: Test fixtures (manifests, bundle metadata.json, stop-attempts.jsonl, transcripts, cloud snapshots) must match the REAL recorder writer shapes (manifest sv1 with candidate.invocation_evidence; bundle metadata sv2; stop-attempts result:'captured'+transcript_bytes; snapshot sv1 + hash over rows).
verify_hint: Compare fixture builders against capture_prompt_manifest, bundle metadata writer, _append_bundle_attempt, build_snapshot
